info.title: Issuing API
info.description: This is the specification for Rain's Issuing API.

post.description: Submits an application to create a corporate account. The application requires details about the company, its legal entity, representatives, and beneficial owners. The initial user must provide a wallet address.

requestBody.description: Application information required for the creation of a corporate account for the company.

allOf.description: The initial user of the company. This user must have a wallet address, and their wallet address will be associated as an owner on the company's Rain smart contract.

role.description: This user's role at their company (not their role on the Rain platform)

walletAddress.description: The user's Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) address. Either this or a Solana address is required if using a Rain-managed solution, but optional otherwise.

solanaAddress.description: The user's Solana address. Either this or a EVM address is required if using a Rain-managed solution, but optional otherwise.

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

name.description: The name of the company requesting to create an account

chainId.description: The chain ID of the external collateral contract, if used. Not required when using Rain's collateral contracts.

contractAddress.description: The address of the external collateral contract, if used. Not required when using Rain's collateral contracts.

sourceKey.description: A unique identifier for the origin of the user

type.description: The type of legal entity (e.g., LLC, S Corp)

description.description: A brief description of the legal entity and its activities

taxId.description: The legal entity's national tax id

expectedSpend.description: The estimated monthly spending by the legal entity

post.summary: Create a consumer application for a user
post.description: Submits an application to create a consumer account for a user. The application can be submitted using a Sumsub share token, Persona share token, or directly via API. The user must provide details about their wallet, occupation, salary, and other account-related information.

requestBody.description: Application information for creating a consumer account for a user.

sumsubShareToken.description: The Sumsub share token used for user verification

allOf.description: The user seeking to create an account. The user must have a wallet, and their wallet will be linked as an owner on their Rain smart contract.

walletAddress.description: The user's Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) address. Either walletAddress or solanaAddress is required if using a Rain-managed solution, but optional otherwise.

solanaAddress.description: The user's Solana address. Either walletAddress or solanaAddress is required if using a Rain-managed solution, but optional otherwise.

chainId.description: The chain ID of the user's external collateral contract, if applicable. Not required when using Rain's collateral contracts.

contractAddress.description: The address of the user's external collateral contract, if applicable. Not required when using Rain's collateral contracts.

sourceKey.description: A unique identifier for the source of this user.

accountPurpose.description: The purpose of the user's account

expectedMonthlyVolume.description: The estimated monthly spending amount for the user

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

hasExistingDocuments.description: Indicates whether the user will use existing documents for additional verification

post.summary: Initiate a consumer application for a user
post.description: Submits an initial application for creating a consumer account. This request gathers basic personal details of the user, including their first and last name, email address, and optional wallet address if using a Rain-managed solution or hosted completion flow.

requestBody.description: Application information for this user

walletAddress.description: The user's wallet address. Required if using the hosted completion flow and a Rain-managed solution. Not required otherwise.

patch.description: Updates the information for an existing corporate account application. The company's details, including name, address, and legal entity information, can be modified through this endpoint.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company whose application is being updated

requestBody.description: Updated information for the company's corporate application.

name.description: The name of the company for the corporate application

type.description: The type of legal entity (e.g., LLC, S Corp)

description.description: A brief description of the legal entity and its activities

taxId.description: The legal entity's national tax ID

expectedSpend.description: The estimated monthly spending by the legal entity

get.summary: Get the status of a company's corporate application
get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of a company's corporate application, including the company's ultimate beneficial owners and application progress.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company whose application status is being retrieved

id.description: The identifier of the company application

patch.description: Updates the application information for a company's Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO). This allows modification of the UBO's personal details such as name, birth date, national ID, and address.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company whose UBO's application is being updated

parameters.name: uboId
parameters.description: The identifier of the UBO whose application is being reapplied

requestBody.description: Updated information for the company's UBO application.

nationalId.description: The UBO's national ID number. For the US, this is a 9-digit SSN

countryOfIssue.description: The 2-digit country code of the user's national ID issuer

patch.description: Updates the application information for a user, including personal details such as name, birth date, occupation, national ID, and account purpose.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The identifier of the user whose application is being updated

requestBody.description: Updated information for the user's application

schema.description: The user must provide a wallet address, which will be registered as an owner on the company's Rain smart contract. The wallet address is required for users involved in Rain-managed solutions.

nationalId.description: The user's national ID number. For the US, this is a 9-digit SSN.

countryOfIssue.description: The 2-digit country code of the user's national ID issuer

accountPurpose.description: The purpose of the user's account

expectedMonthlyVolume.description: The estimated monthly spending amount for the user

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

hasExistingDocuments.description: Indicates whether the user will use existing documents for additional verification

get.summary: Get the status of a user's consumer application
get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of a user's consumer application. This includes the user's application progress and related information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The identifier of the user whose application status is being retrieved

id.description: The identifier of the user's application

put.summary: Reapply or respond to a request for information for a company's corporate application
put.description: Allows a company to reapply or respond to a request for information after submitting their corporate application. This endpoint is typically used when additional information or corrections are needed.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company whose application is being reapplied or updated

requestBody.description: Reapplication information required for this company, including the updated details of the company, its representatives, and ultimate beneficial owners (UBOs).

initialUser.description: The initial user of the company who will be the owner on the Rain smart contract. This user must provide various personal details.

nationalId.description: The user's national ID number. For the US, this is a 9-digit SSN

countryOfIssue.description: The 2-digit country code of the user's national ID issuer

role.description: This user's role at their company (not their role on the Rain platform)

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

name.description: The name of the company reapplying for the corporate application

type.description: The type of legal entity (e.g., LLC, S Corp)

description.description: A brief description of the legal entity, and its activities

expectedSpend.description: The estimated monthly spending by the legal entity

put.summary: Reapply or respond to a request for information for a user's consumer application
put.description: Allows a user to reapply or respond to a request for additional information regarding their consumer application. This is used when the initial application needs updating or more information is required.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The identifier of the user whose application is being reapplied

requestBody.description: Reapplication information for the user, including personal details and updated documents.

schema.description: The user's details required to reapply. The user must have a wallet address, which will be an owner on the company's Rain smart contract.

nationalId.description: The user's national ID number. For the US, this is a 9-digit SSN

countryOfIssue.description: The 2-digit country code of the user's national ID issuer

accountPurpose.description: The purpose of the user's account

expectedMonthlyVolume.description: The estimated monthly spending amount for the user

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

hasExistingDocuments.description: Indicates whether the user will use existing documents for additional verification

put.summary: Upload a document to support a company's corporate application
put.description: Uploads a document that supports a company's corporate application. This is typically used to provide additional documentation, such as proof of address, incorporation certificates, or other required legal documents.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company to upload a document for

requestBody.description: Document to upload to support the company's application. This can be a variety of document types related to company registration, ownership, or other legal matters.

name.description: The name of the document being uploaded

type.description: The type of the document being uploaded

side.description: The side of the document being uploaded

country.description: The country where the document was issued

document.description: The actual document file to be uploaded. The document must be in binary format, and the maximum allowed size is 20 MB.

put.summary: Upload a UBO's document to support a company's corporate application
put.description: Uploads a document for a company's Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) to support the company's corporate application. This endpoint allows for the submission of various legal and identification documents.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company to upload a document for

parameters.name: uboId
parameters.description: The identifier of the UBO for which the document is being uploaded

requestBody.description: Document to upload for the UBO, required to support the company's corporate application.

type.description: The type of the document being uploaded

side.description: The side of the document being uploaded

country.description: The country where the document was issued

document.description: The actual document file to be uploaded. The document must be in binary format, and the maximum allowed size is 20 MB.

put.summary: [Deprecated] Upload a UBO's document to support a company's corporate application
put.description: This deprecated endpoint allows the upload of a document for a UBO to support a company's corporate application. It is recommended to use the newer endpoint for document uploads.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the company to upload a document for

requestBody.description: The document and associated information to upload for the UBO in support of the company's corporate application

type.description: The type of the document being uploaded

side.description: The side of the document being uploaded

country.description: The country where the document was issued

document.description: The actual document file to be uploaded. The document must be in binary format, and the maximum allowed size is 20 MB.

put.summary: Upload a document to support a user's consumer application
put.description: Uploads a document for a user to support their consumer application. This is used to provide additional verification documents such as IDs, utility bills, and other required legal documents.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The identifier of the user to upload the document for

requestBody.description: Document to upload for the user to support their application.

name.description: The name or title of the document being uploaded

type.description: The type of the document being uploaded

side.description: The side of the document being uploaded

country.description: The country where the document was issued

document.description: The actual document file to be uploaded. The document must be in binary format, and the maximum allowed size is 20 MB.

get.summary: Get an authorized user tenant's credit balances
get.description: Retrieves the credit balances for an authorized user tenant. This includes details such as credit limit, pending charges, posted charges, balance due, and spending power.

creditLimit.description: Credit limit of the company, in cents

pendingCharges.description: Pending charges of the company, in cents

postedCharges.description: Posted charges of the company, in cents

balanceDue.description: Balance due of the company, in cents

spendingPower.description: The amount of money the company can spend, in cents

get.summary: Get all the cards for a user or company
get.description: Retrieves all cards associated with a user or company. You can filter by user or company ID and card status.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: For corporate cards, the identifier of the company to get cards for

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The identifier of the user to get cards for

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter cards by status

get.summary: Get a card by its id
get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific card by its unique ID

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to retrieve

patch.description: Update details for an existing card, such as status, limit, billing address, and configuration.

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to update

requestBody.description: The card details to update

status.description: The current status of the card

limit.description: The limit associated with the card

billing.description: The billing address associated with the card.

configuration.description: Configuration for the card, such as virtual card art

virtualCardArt.description: The virtual card art ID used to customize the card's appearance, if applicable

get.summary: Get a card's encrypted data
get.description: Retrieve the encrypted data for a specific card, including the encrypted PAN and CVC

parameters.name: SessionId
parameters.description: Encrypted session ID generated by the user requesting the encrypted data

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to get encrypted data for

schema.description: The encrypted data for the card

get.summary: Get a card's PIN
get.description: Retrieve the encrypted PIN for a specific card

parameters.name: SessionId
parameters.description: Encrypted session ID generated by the user requesting the encrypted PIN

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to get the PIN for

put.description: Updates the PIN of a specific card by setting the encrypted PIN

parameters.name: SessionId
parameters.description: Encrypted session ID generated by the user requesting the encrypted PIN

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to set the PIN for

requestBody.description: The encrypted PIN to set for the card

get.summary: Get all companies
get.description: Retrieves a list of all companies registered in the system

get.summary: Get a company by ID
get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific company using its unique ID

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to retrieve

patch.description: Update the details of an existing company such as its name and address

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to update

requestBody.description: The updates to apply to the company

name.description: The company's name on the Rain platform

post.summary: Create a user in a company
post.description: Creates a new user within a specific company. The user must provide details such as their name, birthdate, and contact information.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to create a user for

requestBody.description: The details of the user to create

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

get.summary: Get a company's credit balances
get.description: Retrieve the current credit balances of a company, including credit limits, pending charges, and the amount due.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to retrieve balances for

creditLimit.description: Credit limit of the company, in cents

pendingCharges.description: Pending charges of the company, in cents

postedCharges.description: Posted charges of the company, in cents

balanceDue.description: Balance due of the company, in cents

spendingPower.description: The amount of money the company can spend, in cents

get.summary: Get smart contract information for a company
get.description: Retrieve the smart contract details associated with a company

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to retrieve smart contract information for

post.summary: Initiate a payment for a company
post.description: Initiate a payment for a specific company by providing the payment amount and wallet address.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to initiate a payment for

requestBody.description: Details of the payment to initiate

amount.description: The amount of the payment, in cents

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the payment transaction is on

walletAddress.description: The wallet address the payment is being sent from

address.description: The address to send the payment to

get.summary: Get payment signature for a company
get.description: Retrieve the payment signature for a company, which is required for completing payment transactions.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to retrieve the payment signature for

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the payment should be made in (as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana)

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of tokens that are being paid

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: isAmountNative
parameters.description: Indicates whether the amount is in the asset's native units. If false, the amount is expressed in cents.

get.summary: Get withdrawal signature for a company
get.description: Retrieve the withdrawal signature for a company, which is required for processing withdrawal requests.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to retrieve the withdrawal signature for

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the withdrawal should be made in, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of tokens being withdrawn

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: recipientAddress
parameters.description: The address the withdrawal should be sent to, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: isAmountNative
parameters.description: Indicates whether the amount is in the asset's native units. If false, the amount is expressed in cents.

post.summary: Charge a company a custom fee
post.description: Initiate a custom fee charge for a company.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The ID of the company to charge a custom fee for

requestBody.description: Details of the custom fee charge

get.summary: Get smart contract information for an authorized user tenant
get.description: Retrieve the smart contract information for a specific authorized user tenant.

get.summary: Get all disputes
get.description: Retrieve all disputes, optionally filtered by company, user, or transaction ID.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: For corporate cards, the identifier of the company to get disputes for

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get disputes for

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to get disputes for

get.summary: Get a dispute by its ID
get.description: Retrieve details of a specific dispute using its unique ID.

parameters.name: disputeId
parameters.description: The ID of the dispute to retrieve

patch.description: Update the status or evidence of a dispute, typically to mark it as canceled or add new evidence.

parameters.name: disputeId
parameters.description: The ID of the dispute to update

requestBody.description: Dispute to update

status.description: The new status of the dispute. Can only be set to 'canceled'.

textEvidence.description: The textual evidence to add to the dispute

get.summary: Get a dispute's file evidence
get.description: Retrieve the file evidence associated with a dispute.

parameters.name: disputeId
parameters.description: The ID of the dispute to get evidence for

put.summary: Upload a file as evidence for a dispute
put.description: Upload a file that will serve as evidence for a dispute.

parameters.name: disputeId
parameters.description: The ID of the dispute to upload evidence for

requestBody.description: File evidence to upload

post.description: This endpoint allows for the creation of a new key with a specified name and expiration time. The key is used for various security operations within the system.

requestBody.description: The key object to be created, including its name and expiration time

name.description: The name of the key being created

expiresAt.description: The expiration timestamp of the key

delete.description: This endpoint allows for the deletion of a specific key using its unique ID.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The ID of the key to delete

post.summary: Initiate a payment for an authorized user tenant
post.description: This endpoint initiates a payment for an authorized user tenant. The request includes the amount to be transferred and the wallet address to send the payment from.

requestBody.description: Details of the payment to initiate

amount.description: The amount of the payment, in cents

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the payment transaction is on

walletAddress.description: The wallet address the payment is being sent from

address.description: The address to send the payment to

get.summary: Get payment signature for an authorized user tenant
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the payment signature for an authorized user tenant. The signature is used to authorize a payment transaction on a blockchain.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the payment should be made in, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of token that is being paid

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

get.summary: Get withdrawal signature for an authorized user tenant
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the withdrawal signature for an authorized user tenant. The signature is used to authorize a withdrawal transaction on a blockchain.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the withdrawal should be made in, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of token that is being withdrawn

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: recipientAddress
parameters.description: The address the withdrawal should be sent to, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

get.summary: Get all transactions
get.description: This endpoint retrieves all transactions associated with corporate cards, users, or specific cards.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: For corporate cards, the identifier of the company to get transactions for

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get transactions for

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: The ID of the card to get transactions for

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of transactions to retrieve

parameters.name: transactionHash
parameters.description: The hash of the transaction to retrieve

parameters.name: authorizedBefore
parameters.description: Filter transactions authorized before a specific date

parameters.name: authorizedAfter
parameters.description: Filter transactions authorized after a specific date

parameters.name: postedBefore
parameters.description: Filter transactions posted before a specific date

parameters.name: postedAfter
parameters.description: Filter transactions posted after a specific date

get.summary: Get a transaction by its id
get.description: This endpoint retrieves a transaction by its unique ID. The transaction information returned includes details such as the transaction type, amount, and status.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to retrieve

patch.description: This endpoint allows updating a specific transaction by its ID. You can modify the transaction's memo or other editable fields.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to update

requestBody.description: The transaction object to update

memo.description: A memo or note to attach to the transaction, providing additional information or context

post.summary: Create a dispute for a transaction
post.description: This endpoint allows the creation of a dispute for a specific transaction. The dispute can include textual evidence to support the claim.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to create a dispute for

requestBody.description: The dispute object to create, which includes textual evidence to support the dispute claim

textEvidence.description: The textual evidence that supports the dispute

get.summary: Get a transaction's receipt
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the receipt for a specific transaction. The receipt is returned as a binary file, typically in PDF or similar format.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to retrieve the receipt for

put.description: This endpoint allows you to upload a receipt for a specific transaction. The receipt is provided as a binary file, typically in PDF format.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The ID of the transaction to upload a receipt for

requestBody.description: The receipt file to upload, typically in PDF or other binary formats

receipt.description: The receipt file to upload, typically in PDF or other binary formats

get.summary: Get all users
get.description: This endpoint retrieves all users associated with a specific company. The response will return a list of users, including their personal and contact details.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: For corporate cards, the identifier of the company to get users for

post.description: This endpoint allows the creation of a new authorized user with the necessary personal details, including contact and wallet information.

requestBody.description: The user details required to create a new authorized user

get.summary: Get a user by id
get.description: This endpoint retrieves a specific user by their unique ID. The user details, including contact and wallet information, are returned.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to retrieve

patch.description: This endpoint allows the update of a specific user's information, such as their name, email, and contact details.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to update

requestBody.description: The updates to apply to the user

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user is active

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

delete.description: This endpoint deletes a user by their unique ID. Once deleted, the user will no longer have access to the system.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete

get.summary: Get a users's credit balances
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the credit balances for a specific user. It provides information about the user's credit limit, pending charges, posted charges, balance due, and spending power.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get balances for

creditLimit.description: Credit limit of the user, in cents

pendingCharges.description: Pending charges of the user, in cents

postedCharges.description: Posted charges of the user, in cents

balanceDue.description: Balance due of the user, in cents

spendingPower.description: The amount of money the user can spend, in cents

get.summary: Get smart contract information for a user
get.description: This endpoint retrieves smart contract information for a specific user. It returns a list of contracts associated with the user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get the smart contracts for

get.summary: Get payment signature for a user
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the payment signature for a specific user. The signature is used to authorize a payment transaction for the user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get a payment signature for

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the payment should be made in, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of token that is being paid

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

get.summary: Get withdrawal signature for a user
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the withdrawal signature for a specific user. The signature is required to authorize a withdrawal transaction for the user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to get a withdrawal signature for

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The address of the token that the withdrawal should be made in, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of token that is being withdrawn

parameters.name: adminAddress
parameters.description: The address of the admin making the payment, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

parameters.name: recipientAddress
parameters.description: The address the withdrawal should be sent to, as a hex string for EVM or base58 string for Solana

post.summary: Charge a user a custom fee
post.description: This endpoint allows creating a custom fee charge for a specific user. The fee can be defined in the request body along with its details.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to create a custom fee charge for

requestBody.description: The custom fee charge to create for the user, which includes the amount and description of the charge

post.summary: Create a card for a user
post.description: This endpoint allows the creation of a card for a specific user. The card can either be physical or virtual and can include various configuration options such as the display name and limit.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to create a card for

requestBody.description: The card details to create, including the card type, status, limit, and optional configurations such as the shipping and billing address

status.description: The initial status of the card

limit.description: The initial credit limit for the card, expressed in cents

configuration.description: Configuration details for the card, including display name, product ID, and virtual card art

displayName.description: The name to display on the card. If omitted, it will be the user's full name trimmed to 30 characters.

productId.description: The product ID to use for the card, denoting its BIN range. Only relevant if custom product IDs or product references are part of the user's contract.

productRef.description: The product reference to use for the card, denoting its appearance. Only relevant if custom product IDs or product references are part of the user's contract.

virtualCardArt.description: The virtual card art ID to use for the card, denoting its virtual appearance. Only relevant if custom virtual card art IDs are part of the user's contract.

allOf.description: The address to ship the card, if it is a physical card

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to use for shipping, if it is a physical card

method.description: The shipping method to use for the card. Standard and express are for US addresses, while international is for non-US addresses.

billing.description: The address that will serve as the billing address for the card. Defaults to the shipping address or team address if not explicitly provided.

post.summary: Initiate a payment for a user
post.description: This endpoint allows initiating a payment for a specific user. The payment is made from the user's wallet address to the specified recipient address.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to initiate a payment for

requestBody.description: Payment details to initiate, including the amount to be paid and the wallet address to send the payment from

amount.description: The amount of the payment, in cents

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the payment transaction is on

walletAddress.description: The wallet address the payment is being sent from

address.description: The address to send the payment to

cursorParam.name: cursor
cursorParam.description: The ID of the resource after which to start fetching

limitParam.name: limit
limitParam.description: The number of resources to fetch

IssuingApplication.description: The details of an issuing application.

applicationExternalVerificationLink.description: The link to the external verification page for the application

url.description: The URL for the external verification page

applicationCompletionLink.description: The link to the application completion page

url.description: The URL for the completion page

applicationReason.description: The reason behind the current application status

nationalId.description: The person's national ID number. For the US, this is a 9-digit SSN

countryOfIssue.description: The 2-digit country code of the person's national ID issuer

phoneCountryCode.description: The country code for the phone number

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the person

companyId.description: The ID of the company that issued the card

userId.description: The userID to whom the card was issued

type.description: The type of the card (physical or virtual)

last4.description: The last four digits of the card number

expirationMonth.description: The expiration month of the card

expirationYear.description: The expiration year of the card

items.description: The name of the wallet that the tokenized card was added to

IssuingCardLimit.description: Represents the spending limit and frequency for a card.

amount.description: The maximum spending amount in cents

frequency.description: The frequency at which the spending limit resets

IssuingCardStatus.description: The current status of the card

allOf.description: Represents an issuing company with details about its identity and location.

name.description: The company's name on the Rain platform

IssuingContract.description: Represents an issuing contract with details about its deployment and token handling.

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the smart contract is deployed on

controllerAddress.description: The address of the contract's controller

proxyAddress.description: The proxy address of the contract

depositAddress.description: The address where funds should be deposited

tokens.description: Tokens that the contract accepts for transactions

address.description: The address of the token contract

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate for the token

advanceRate.description: The advance rate for the token

IssuingDispute.description: Represents a dispute related to an issuing transaction.

status.description: The current status of the dispute

textEvidence.description: Textual evidence provided by the parties involved in the dispute

createdAt.description: The date and time when the dispute was created

resolvedAt.description: The date and time when the dispute was resolved, if applicable

IssuingKey.description: Represents a unique key used for issuing, typically used for authentication or encryption purposes.

key.description: The actual key used for the issuing process

name.description: The name assigned to the key

expiresAt.description: The expiration date and time of the key

allOf.description: Represents a user associated with an issuing application, including personal and account status details.

companyId.description: The identifier of the company the user belongs to, if applicable

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

isTermsOfServiceAccepted.description: Indicates whether the user has accepted the terms of service

phoneCountryCode.description: The country code for the user's phone number

ApplicationStatus.description: Represents the possible statuses of an application.

PhysicalAddress.description: Represents a physical address with components like street, city, region, postal code, and country.

line1.description: The first line of the street address

line2.description: The second line of the street address (optional)

region.description: The region or state of the address

postalCode.description: The postal or zip code of the address

countryCode.description: The 2-letter country code of the address

country.description: The full name of the country

oneOf.title: If Signature Is Pending
oneOf.description: Indicates the signature is pending and provides the time after which a retry is possible.

retryAfter.description: The number of seconds after which the signature can be retried

oneOf.title: If Signature Is Ready
oneOf.description: Indicates that the signature is ready and includes the signature data and expiration time.

salt.description: The salt used to generate the signature

expiresAt.description: The time at which the signature will expire

oneOf.description: Represents a transaction of type 'spend'. This includes details such as the transaction amount, merchant, and the associated user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the transaction

spend.description: Details specific to a spend transaction, including merchant, amount, and user information.

amount.description: The amount of the transaction, in cents

localAmount.description: The amount of the transaction in local currency, in cents

localCurrency.description: The local currency of the transaction

authorizedAmount.description: The authorized amount of the transaction, in cents

authorizationMethod.description: The method used for authorization of the transaction

memo.description: A memo or note associated with the transaction

receipt.description: Indicates whether a receipt was generated for the transaction

merchantName.description: The name of the merchant where the transaction took place

merchantCategory.description: The category of the merchant (e.g., electronics, food)

enrichedMerchantIcon.description: The enriched icon of the merchant

enrichedMerchantName.description: An enriched name of the merchant, possibly with additional information

enrichedMerchantCategory.description: An enriched category of the merchant, providing further details

cardId.description: The unique identifier of the card used for the transaction

cardType.description: The type of card used for the transaction

companyId.description: The identifier of the company under which the transaction was made

userId.description: The identifier of the user who made the transaction

userFirstName.description: The first name of the user who made the transaction

userLastName.description: The last name of the user who made the transaction

userEmail.description: The email address of the user who made the transaction

declinedReason.description: The reason why the transaction was declined

authorizedAt.description: The time at which the transaction was authorized

postedAt.description: The time at which the transaction was posted

oneOf.title: SpendTransaction

oneOf.description: Represents a collateral transaction, where a user provides collateral for a transaction.

id.description: The unique identifier of the transaction

type.description: The type of transaction, in this case, a collateral transaction

collateral.description: Details of the collateral transaction, including amount, currency, and transaction details.

amount.description: The amount of the collateral transaction, in cents

currency.description: The currency of the collateral transaction

memo.description: A memo or note associated with the collateral transaction

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the collateral transaction is on

walletAddress.description: The wallet address the collateral was added from

transactionHash.description: The hash of the collateral transaction

companyId.description: The identifier of the company under which the collateral transaction was made

userId.description: The identifier of the user who provided the collateral

postedAt.description: The time at which the collateral transaction was posted

oneOf.title: CollateralTransaction

oneOf.description: Represents a payment transaction, where a payment is made for a particular service or product.

id.description: The unique identifier of the payment transaction

payment.description: Details of the payment transaction, including amount, currency, and status.

amount.description: The amount of the transaction, in cents

memo.description: The memo or note associated with the transaction

chainId.description: The chain ID (base-10 number) that the payment transaction is on

walletAddress.description: The wallet address from which the payment was made

transactionHash.description: The hash of the payment transaction

companyId.description: The identifier of the company under which the payment transaction was made

userId.description: The identifier of the user who made the payment

postedAt.description: The time at which the payment transaction was posted

oneOf.title: PaymentTransaction

oneOf.description: Represents a fee transaction, where a fee is charged for a service or product.

id.description: The identifier of the fee transaction

type.description: The type of transaction, in this case, a fee transaction

fee.description: Details of the fee transaction, including amount, description, and status.

amount.description: The amount of the fee, in cents

companyId.description: The identifier of the company to which the fee was charged

userId.description: The identifier of the user to whom the fee was charged

postedAt.description: The time at which the fee was posted

oneOf.title: FeeTransaction

IssuingChargeCreateChargeBody.description: Represents the body of a request to create a charge, including the amount and a description of the charge.

amount.description: The amount of the charge, in cents

IssuingChargeCreateChargeResponse.description: Represents the response body returned after a charge is created, including the charge ID, creation timestamp, and charge details.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the charge was created

amount.description: The amount of the charge, in cents
